programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Halstead treats a woman on the verge of freezing to death; Dr. Charles' ex-wife receives some concerning news; Choi handles a lymphoma patient with viral meningitis and a complicated family; Manning makes a house call.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: When a car unexpectedly smashes through the ambulance bay doors, Dr. Choi makes some difficult decisions in an effort to save a worker trapped beneath the wreckage and April, who's also in danger.

programme.desc: Manning and her three-year-old patient are trapped in a helicopter as the toddler's stats decline; Charles isn't sure Choi's alcoholic patient with liver failure has quite hit rock bottom.

programme.desc: Halstead hides the theft of his gun from a suspicious Manning; tensions are still high between Connor and Bekker, who take a risk operating on an HIV-positive patient; Hank breaks down when he sees a patient from his past.

programme.title: The Gray House
programme.desc: Numb from trauma, Elizabeth returns from the conflict and is stopped by Stokely for questioning; she finds an ally in Hampton.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: An Army veteran delivers a parcel to his neighbor, but instead of receiving gratitude, he ignites a war between the two military men that spirals out of control, until the feud finally ends in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: A sniper targeting abortion doctors turns murderous and a DNA "needle in a haystack" identifies the gunman.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Sgt. Parker is forced to confront his feelings about his child when a desperate man at a hospital holds doctors at gunpoint until his dying daughter gets a new heart.

programme.desc: An Army veteran delivers a parcel to his neighbor, but instead of receiving gratitude, he ignites a war between the two military men that spirals out of control, until the feud finally ends in a hail of bullets.

The disastrous cruise continues when Bobby and Athena respond to the ship's explosion, racing to aid injured passengers; Hen questions her instincts in a life-taking call and grows concerned about Athena and Bobby's whereabouts.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.desc: With each moment becoming critical as the ship flips upside down, Athena and Bobby take charge, seeking methods for rescue while navigating efforts to guide survivors to safety; Hen defies protocols in her search for Bobby and Athena.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Upon her return to shore, Athena's son finds himself in trouble with the law; Buck grows envious as Eddie forms a close bond with someone else; the team rescues a woman who's stuck on receiving a rose at an iconic mansion.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Hen and Karen welcome a new addition to their family; a call unfolds involving a person's limb that's taken on a mind of its own; Eddie and Marisol take a closer look at their relationship; Buck navigates his new feelings.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.desc: After years of anticipation, Maddie and Chimney's long-awaited wedding day arrives; when the groom mysteriously vanishes, the 118 races against time to ensure he doesn't miss the most crucial day of his life.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Maddie and Athena investigate a case surrounding an abducted mother and child; Hen and Karen learn more about Mara's family history; Eddie grapples with unresolved feelings for someone from his past.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Sullivan's Crossing
programme.desc: Maggie tries to figure out what's causing Tracy's fever as Cal learns that Ben hasn't been honest with them and Liam finally comes clean about what happened in the past.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: After a victim of the apartment fire that changed Bobby's life resurfaces, he searches to make amends; driven by his need to right past wrongs, Bobby delves deep into memories of his childhood, unearthing moments from his fractured past.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: The unofficial mayor of an idyllic suburban street locks horns with the new neighbor who shows no respect for local values; disagreements escalate to arguments, threats, and property damage, ending in brutal violence that shatters two families.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: A small town encounters satanic rituals and a savage killer.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: An innocent bystander creates complications for the team when he stumbles into the middle of a drug bust.

programme.title: Chicago Med

programme.title: Crime Scene Investigators
programme.desc: A concerned colleague discovers the remains of 28-year-old finance manager Cathy Marlow in an office bathroom.
